name: Green Chili-Cheese Souffle
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Butter a 1-1/2 quart souffle dish or baking dish.
3. Shred cheese and set aside.
4. Combine eggs, green chili peppers, baking mix, and milk in bowl.
5. Process until mixed well, about 6-8 seconds.
If using whole chiles, process mixture until chiles are chopped into
1/4-inch pieces, about 15 seconds.
6. Pour mixture into prepared dish.
7. Add shredded cheese and stir gently to mix well.
8. Bake about 1 hour or until souffle is puffed and dry on top.
Note: If using oil-packed sun-dried tomatoes, drain, pat dry, and chop them.
If using the dry ones, rehydrate in a little hot water for a few minutes,
drain, pat dry, and chop.
